import React from 'react' import {Link} from 'react-router-dom' import {format} from 'date-fns' const BlogPreview = ({title,summary,description,imageUrl,createdAt,author}) => { return (
{title}

{author}

{format(new Date(createdAt),'MMM d, yyyy HH:mm')}

{summary}

Go somewhere
) } export default BlogPreview
